title: How to Pay for a Featured Listing on BuyAndScrap.com
metaDescription: Discover how to pay for a featured listing on BuyAndScrap.com. Our simple, secure card payments help your car get noticed faster by UK buyers. Get selling today!
targetKeyword: how do i pay for a featured listing
content:
To pay for a featured listing on BuyAndScrap.com, first create your standard car advert. Then, select your chosen featured upgrade from your seller dashboard. You can complete your payment securely using a debit or credit card through our trusted online portal. This simple process gets your car seen faster by more buyers across the UK.

## Why Feature Your Car on BuyAndScrap.com?
Selling your car can be competitive. A featured listing helps your vehicle stand out. Your advert appears higher in search results. It also features in special sections across our site.

This means more views for your car. It often leads to quicker sales. It's a smart, effective way to attract serious UK buyers.

## How to Pay for a Featured Listing: A Simple Guide

### 1. Create Your Standard Car Advert
Before featuring your car, you need a great standard listing. Head over to our [Sell Your Car](/sell) page to begin. Upload clear, honest photos of your vehicle. Write an accurate, compelling description.

Set a fair, competitive price for your car. Ensure your vehicle is ready for sale, perhaps by checking its MOT status with our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker). A strong basic advert makes your featured listing even more effective.

### 2. Choose Your Featured Upgrade
Once your standard advert is live, navigate to your seller dashboard. You will find your active listings there. Select the specific car you wish to feature.

We offer various featured listing tiers. Each option clearly outlines its benefits and cost. Choose the upgrade that best suits your selling goals and budget.

### 3. Complete Your Payment Securely
After selecting your desired upgrade, you will be guided to our secure payment portal. This is where you will finalise your purchase.

We use advanced, trusted technology to protect your details. The payment steps are quick and straightforward. You'll be back to selling your car in no time.

## Accepted Payment Methods

### Debit and Credit Cards
BuyAndScrap.com accepts all major UK debit and credit cards. This includes Visa, Mastercard, and Maestro. Our payment gateway uses advanced encryption technology.

Your card details are completely safe and secure. Simply enter your card number, expiry date, and the CVV/security code when prompted. You may also need to complete a 3D Secure verification check. This extra step is standard practice for secure online payments in the UK.

### What Happens After Payment?
As soon as your payment is successfully processed, your featured listing goes live instantly. You will receive a confirmation email straight away.

Your car then gains immediate extra visibility. It will appear higher in relevant search results. It also shows in dedicated featured sections on BuyAndScrap.com, reaching more potential buyers.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: How do I know my payment is secure?**
A: BuyAndScrap.com uses a fully encrypted payment gateway. This technology protects your card details during the transaction. We also implement 3D Secure verification for UK cards. This adds an extra layer of online transaction security, giving you peace of mind.

**Q: Can I pay with PayPal or bank transfer?**
A: Currently, we accept major UK debit and credit cards only. This method ensures the fastest and most secure processing for your featured listing. We aim for efficiency so your car can get seen without delay.

**Q: How quickly will my listing go live after payment?**
A: Your featured listing goes live almost instantly after successful payment. You'll receive a confirmation email. Your car will then immediately start gaining extra visibility across the platform.

**Q: What if I have problems paying for a featured listing?**
A: If you encounter any issues during the payment process, please contact our customer support team. We're here to help you get your car seen. You can find our contact details in the footer of our website.

Making your car stand out is simple with BuyAndScrap.com. Understanding **how do I pay for a featured listing** ensures a smooth, fast process. Get your vehicle the attention it deserves.

Ready to find your next car? [Browse our honest, affordable cars today!](/cars)
